title: Comparison of the Effectiveness and Side Effects of Intravenous TPA Injection in Acute Stroke Patients Between 0 and 4.5 Hours and the First 4.5 to 6 Hours From the Onset of Symptoms (P7-5.018).
abstract: In the American Academy of Neurology Annual Meeting Abstract "Comparison of the Effectiveness and Side Effects of Intravenous TPA Injection in Acute Stroke Patients Between 0 and 4.5 hours and the First 4.5 to 6 hours From the Onset of Symptoms (P7-5.018)" by Maghbooli et al.,
